mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_statistics ORDER BY stat_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT stat_date AS statDate,
CAST(total_users AS DECIMAL(18,2)) CAST(active_users AS DECIMAL(18,2)) CAST(total_courses AS DECIMAL(18,2)) CAST(total_certificates AS DECIMAL(18,2)) CAST(total_resumes AS DECIMAL(18,2)) CAST(total_jobs AS DECIMAL(18,2)) CAST(total_users AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS value FROM data_statistics WHERE stat_date >= #{startDate} AND stat_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY stat_date ASC
SELECT * FROM data_statistics WHERE stat_date = #{statDate} LIMIT 1
